entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall, leading to a shortage of water.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE CROP INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing crop productivity on the same area of land while maintaining or improving ecosystem services.

entities.name: RAINFED AREAS
entities.description: Agricultural areas that rely solely on rainfall for water supply.

entities.name: BUNDELKHAND REGION
entities.description: A region in Central India characterized by rainfed agriculture and water scarcity.

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: The central geographical part of India.

entities.name: GARKUNDAR-DABAR WATERSHED
entities.description: A specific watershed area used as a proof of concept for water management.

entities.name: PARASAI-SINDH WATERSHED
entities.description: A specific watershed area used as a proof of concept for water management.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Interventions aimed at optimizing the use of water in agriculture to improve resilience and yield.

entities.name: RAINWATER HARVESTING
entities.description: The collection and storage of rain, rather than allowing it to run off.

entities.name: HAVELI SYSTEM
entities.description: A traditional rainwater harvesting system specific to the Bundelkhand region.

entities.name: IN SITU WATER HARVESTING
entities.description: Water harvesting techniques that capture water where it falls on the field.

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient available water resources to meet demands.

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: The benefits people obtain from ecosystems.

entities.name: IMPROVED AGRICULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Enhanced farming techniques to increase productivity and sustainability.

entities.name: BALANCED FERTILIZER APPLICATION
entities.description: The application of fertilizers in the correct proportions to meet crop needs.

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART CROP CULTIVARS
entities.description: Crop varieties developed to be resilient to climate change and environmental stress.

entities.name: WEED AND PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Strategies to control weeds and pests to protect crop health.

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of additional water to crops during dry spells to supplement rainfall.

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area of land.

entities.name: CROPPING INTENSITY
entities.description: The number of crops grown on a piece of land in a year.

entities.name: GROUNDWATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water present in the underground aquifers.

entities.name: CROP RISK
entities.description: The potential for crop failure due to environmental or biological factors.

entities.name: FALLOW LAND
entities.description: Land that is left unseeded for one or more growing seasons.

entities.name: BASE FLOW
entities.description: The portion of streamflow that comes from groundwater seepage.

entities.name: FLOODS
entities.description: An overflow of water that submerges land that is usually dry.

entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The displacement of the upper layer of soil.

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the quality of land due to various factors.

entities.name: LAND AND WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of output produced to the amount of land and water used.

entities.name: UTTAR PRADESH
entities.description: A state in northern India where the Bundelkhand region is partially located.

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: The process of developing and strengthening the skills and capacities of individuals and communities.

entities.name: DRYLANDS
entities.description: Regions characterized by a lack of water and low rainfall.
